mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, username, operation, method, params, ip, execute_time, create_time FROM operation_log
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') AND operation LIKE CONCAT('%', #{operation}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_log (user_id, username, operation, method, params, ip, execute_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{operation}, #{method}, #{params}, #{ip}, #{executeTime})
